privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic dividend reconciliation task using test data for Johnson & Johnson (JNJ, ISIN US4781601046). The synthetic dataset contains 4 dividend payments in 2023: March 7 ($113.00 gross/$16.95 tax), June 6 ($119.00/$17.85), September 5 ($119.00/$17.85), and December 5 ($119.00/$17.85). The task XML initially contains only the first two dividends, making the September 5 and December 5 dividends the 'missing' ones that must be added. All metadata values (expected_total_dividends=4, missing_dividend amounts and dates, tolerance=0.05) are accurate to the synthetic test data created by setup_task.sh.
